infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to place AR anchors in the real world.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to save and retrieve spatial anchors.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to save and retrieve spatial anchors.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Spatial Canvas to access your camera to place AR anchors.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Spatial Canvas to use your location to save and retrieve spatial anchors.
